title: Email our customers/clients with non-monday.com license back and forth
excerpt: Currently I have an intake process with clients who submit forms for their requests and its created in the update window those details via an automation. I would love the ability to email the customers and have 2 way com…

posts.author: laguerrad (David Laguerra)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently I have an intake process with clients who submit forms for their requests and its created in the update window those details via an automation. I would love the ability to email the customers and have 2 way communication via the “update” window.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @laguerrad you can use an app named Supermail, it will allow you 2 way email communication directly from Monday item view. You can try it for free, make sure after u install you add the Supermail Dialog item view.

auth.monday.com

SuperMail - monday.com Marketplace

Emails: Design, Send and Track directly from monday.com
